findings.default_text: Lorelei, for example, was the first member of the elite four
findings.loose_text: Lorelai, for example, was the first member of the Elite Four
findings.corrected_text: Lorelai, for example, was the first member of the Elite Four
findings.evidence: Lorelei is the Ice-type Elite Four member from Gen 1. In Gen 2 (where this commentary is set), her name is spelled "Lorelai". Default uses the wrong spelling.

findings.default_text: only needed to beat falconer to be considered
findings.loose_text: only needed to beat Faulkner to
findings.corrected_text: only needed to beat Falkner to be considered
findings.evidence: Falkner is the Johto gym leader, not "Falconer". Loose transcription also has "Faulkner" variant. Correct name is "Falkner".

findings.corrected_text: because in Gen 1 well yes Lieutenant Surge is a trash man he does
findings.evidence: Loose has "search" (hallucination/mishear), default has correct "Surge". Confirmed correct name is Lt. Surge.

findings.corrected_text: with Lorelai, I'm kind of looking at these
